subject: Fw: Palm Beach Pick up & Delivery
body:
Fyi - I am coordinating w/Janus




Thx

G

----- Original Message -----
From: Jeffrey Gilman <jgilman@artefactousa.com>
To: 'Jennifer Turner' <jenniferturner@mindspring.com>
Cc: 'Rachel Hartley' <rhartley@artefactousa.com>
Sent: Thu Jan 03 12:15:07 2008
Subject: RE: Palm Beach Pick up & Delivery

Hi Jennifer,

The earliest we can be there is 11 am so let me know if that works. Also,
the owner is on vacation until the 7th of January. He does not take direct
communication but you can direct all questions or concerns to my manager
Rachel Hartley and she can direct them to him. You can reach her here at the
showroom or e-mail her at rhartley@artefactousa.com
We will be picking up the pieces which are on re-order (club chairs, etc)
and delivering the new bedroom pieces as well as the South Beach items we
have in stock. I will be switching out the large cowhide rug for the
Champagne color.
Please let me know if 11 am works for you having someone there to let us in.
I will be coming with Rachel Hartley the manager to oversee the delivery and
pick up.
Thank you.


 


Regards,
 
Jeffrey A. Gilman
Design & Sales Associate
artefacto
2568 East Sunrise Blvd.
Fort Lauderdale, FL 33304
954-564-5775 T
954-564-5760 F
jgilman@artefactousa.com
www. artefacto.com
 
 


-----Original Message-----
From: Jennifer Turner [mailto:jenniferturner@mindspring.com] 
Sent: Thursday, January 03, 2008 11:55 AM
To: Jeffrey Gilman
Subject: Re: Palm Beach Pick up & Delivery

Please confirm the time + what items exactly you will removing and which
ones you will be bringing ..also I would like to talk to the owner.what is
his name and is he back?

Thx
